name: Domino Sugar
description: Domino Foods, Inc. produces a variety of sugar products, including Dark Brown Sugar under the Domino® Sugar brand. As a leading industrial sugar supplier, the company emphasizes its commitment to quality and innovation in its offerings.

name: Lantic Inc.
description: Lantic is a Canadian manufacturer that specializes in a variety of natural sweeteners, including brown sugar. Their offerings include trusted brands like Lantic Rogers, ensuring a high-quality product for both retail and industrial markets.

name: Western Sugar Cooperative
description: Western Sugar Cooperative produces high-quality Light and Dark Brown Sugar, emphasizing sustainable practices and rigorous production standards. Their brown sugar products are versatile ingredients ideal for baking and cooking.

name: Sugar C&H Company Inc
description: C&H® Sugar is a leading manufacturer of brown sugar, among other sweeteners, and has a significant production capacity, making it a key supplier for the food industry.

name: Brown Sugar India
description: Brown Sugar is a prominent bakery and café chain in Jaipur, known for its high-quality cakes and diverse food offerings. With a commitment to excellence and innovation, it has established itself as a favorite destination for those seeking delicious baked goods and a warm dining experience.

name: The Teahouse Tapioca and Tea
description: The Teahouse Tapioca & Tea offers a variety of beverages, including a focus on traditional Taiwanese tea flavors, which may include brown sugar options. Their commitment to high-quality ingredients ensures an exceptional tea experience.

name: Nile Sugar
description: Nile Sugar is a manufacturer of white sugar, produced from beet sugar extraction, along with by-products like molasses.

name: Gordon Food Service Store
description: The company offers brown sugar, specifically a 1 lb package of dark brown sugar, available for same-day pickup. This product is part of their extensive selection of food and beverage items.

name: Brown Sugar Botanicals
description: Brown Sugar Botanicals specializes in crafting herbal products and remedies, with a focus on traditional herbal applications and organically-grown hemp.

name: Natural Life s.c. Cyprus
description: Natural Life offers brown sugar, a sucrose product characterized by its distinctive brown color from molasses, highlighting its commitment to high-quality natural products.
